source_policy: Structural examples only. No client names, report names, prose, imagery, branding, IDs, URLs, account/campaign selections, datasource configuration, query parameter values, cached data, or metric results are retained.

catalog_summary.deduplication: SHA-256 of sanitized ordered widget family, widget type, safe display shape, hidden state, and exact x/y/w/h geometry.

agent_rules: Treat examples as composition references, never as customer data or mandatory defaults.
Select a pattern by widget families, report purpose, connected platforms, and available metrics.
Map neutral slots to newly created widget IDs; never reuse IDs from another board.
Use live query and widget catalogs before choosing query keys or metrics.
Preview placement or layout updates, then validate the finished board.
Adapt the pattern to the user brief; do not blindly reproduce every slot.
